name: Luca, Inc.
summary: Luca, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, produces, processes, markets, and distributes organic and other agricultural products made from corn and grains in Shanxi province, the People's Republic of China. The company operates through Corn, Grain, and Bulk Trading divisions. It provides corn and corn byproducts. The company also offers packaged and unpackaged grains, including millet, soy bean, green bean, black rice, wheat, etc.; simple processed grain products packaged under Deyu and Shitie trademarks; bean based products under the Huichun brand name, including vegetarian products and instant noodles made from soybeans, black beans, and green beans; and fruit vinegars and juices under the Longquan Villa brand. In addition, it is also involved in the procurement, trading, and wholesale of rice, flour, wheat, kidney beans, green beans, and other agricultural products. The company serves livestock feed companies, food manufacturers, corn oil/corn starch manufacturing companies, grain trading companies, wholesalers, distributors, institutional clients, governmental procurement agencies, and retail stores. The company was formerly known as Deyu Agriculture Corp. and changed its name to Luca, Inc. in January 2016. Luca, Inc. is headquartered in Beijing, the People's Republic of China. Luca, Inc. is a subsidiary of Expert Venture Ltd.
